title: Violence as the Only Effective Tool
html:
Stub. The opening line of 2022 03 11 one hundred years of solitude reading log (which then pivots into a chapter log) is: "Made people vote to prove voting is a farce. only effective thing is violence."

Read in the context of the chapter log that follows — the banana-company massacre at the train station, Colonel Aureliano's uprisings — this seems triggered by the novel rather than a political manifesto. But it's a sharp standalone line worth tracking against later political notes (2025 02 15 conspiracy theories etc.).
